subtasks.description: Query AWS cost/spend database to retrieve actual spend by service and time period, aggregated at the commitment level
Query contract management system to retrieve AWS commitment levels, terms, and reserved instance/savings plan details

Reconcile actual spend against committed levels; calculate variance (overcommit/underutilization), utilization rate, and efficiency posture. Classify each commitment as overcommitted, optimally utilized, or underutilized with recommendations

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks: (1) and (2) are parallel SQL queries to separate systems—actual spend from cost/billing DB and commitments from contract DB—both mid-tier due to multi-table joins and aggregation; (3) is cross_recon to reconcile the two sources, calculate variances, classify utilization posture, and generate recommendations (mid-tier). No policy_action is needed—classification and posture assessment are part of the reconciliation logic, not policy compliance. This is the minimal decomposition: neither query can be combined (different systems), and reconciliation inherently requires both upstream results.

output.sql: SELECT cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.publisher, cf.product, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as actual_spend, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as total_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) as commitment_count FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.publisher, cf.product ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year DESC, cf.fiscal_quarter DESC, cf.publisher, cf.product
SELECT vendor_name, contract_id, invoice_date, due_date, paid_date, amount_usd, status FROM invoice_facts WHERE vendor_name ILIKE '%AWS%' ORDER BY invoice_date DESC

reconciled.recommendation: Unable to reconcile - no MongoDB operational state provided; SQL consumption_facts table accessible but commitment levels not present in invoice_facts; requires contract commitment amounts for variance calculation

sql_value.limitation: invoice_facts contains payment data, not committed capacity or reserved instance allocations

reconciled.recommendation: SQL schema lacks committed capacity field; consumption_facts has actual_spend but no baseline commitment amount; requires joining to commitment/reservation table with reserved_amount_usd or commitment_usd field to calculate variance
